commit_scope: Add live oracle process and continuous emission-cycle rows to the witness receipt floor.

commands: coord join && coord claim "witness live oracle emission floor"

cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/nearest-shape.fk form-stdlib/classifier-eval.fk form-stdlib/co-learning.fk form-stdlib/co-learning-stream.fk form-stdlib/champion-challenger.fk form-stdlib/colearning-retire.fk form-stdlib/choice-receipt.fk form-stdlib/branch-choice-order.fk form-stdlib/choice-receipt-learning.fk form-stdlib/oracle-catalog.fk form-stdlib/text-summary-learning.fk form-stdlib/llm-feature-channel-floor.fk form-stdlib/android-mesh-learning.fk form-stdlib/witness-state-receipt.fk form-stdlib/tests/witness-state-receipt-band.fk
local_validation.notes: Focused validation returned 16777215 with `fourth arm: 1 band(s) four-way` and `1 ok, 0 divergent`. The manifest gate returned `PASS-4WAY witness-state-receipt`. The recipe now validates live oracle process rows, rejects fixture process providers, requires source-backed labels to be covered by running process rows, validates emission cycles carrying export, labels, processes, and heldout rows, and proves continuous emission only across increasing witness export cycles.

ci_validation.notes: Not pushed when this evidence was written; CI had not run yet.

deploy_validation.summary: No deploy requested for this Form recipe slice. Public pulse was strained at start with web not breathing, so no public health claim is made.

phase_gate.gate: Live oracle teacher labels must be emitted by running non-fixture process rows across increasing native witness export cycles.
phase_gate.next: Start the actual STT, vision, multimodal, and GPU oracle carriers under this Form process-row contract and write emission cycles into the native substrate ledger.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: The witness receipt floor now distinguishes one-off source-backed labels from continuous live-process emission. Labels must be covered by running teacher processes, each cycle must bind export, labels, process rows, and heldout rows, and continuity requires increasing export sequences without frame/sample regressions.
test_flows: Oracle process rows require feature, non-fixture provider, protocol, running status, confidence floor, and summary-only privacy.
Source-backed labels must be covered by a matching provider/protocol/feature process row.
Emission cycles bind export, labels, process rows, and heldout rows under the source-backed learning floor.
Continuous emission requires at least two valid cycles with increasing witness export sequences and non-regressing frame/sample counts.
e2e_validation.summary: The established floor is continuous live-process oracle emission as Form-native witness receipt rows. Remaining gaps are physical carrier startup and native substrate-ledger writing from the running witness service.
